prd.oneLiner: Connect document classification, versions, owners, review and approval, access controls, and retention policy.
prd.goal: Achieve 95% or more current-owner assignment for critical operating documents.
prd.whyNow: Files, versions, and review history are spread across repositories, making the current copy and accountable owner hard to find.
prd.problem: Files, versions, and review history are spread across repositories, making the current copy and accountable owner hard to find.
prd.solution: Connect document classification, versions, owners, review and approval, access controls, and retention policy.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee authoring or finding work documents
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Files, versions, and review history are spread across repositories, making the current copy and accountable owner hard to find.

targets.name: Document and knowledge operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Files, versions, and review history are spread across repositories, making the current copy and accountable owner hard to find.

scenarios.text: Employee authoring or finding work documents completes document authoring and file registration and checks progress.
Document and knowledge operations coordinator reviews document freshness, approval delay, and retention-policy reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Achieve 95% or more current-owner assignment for critical operating documents.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Document, folder, version, owner, and approval-status lookup
Review, approval, version management, and retention handling
Document freshness, approval delay, and retention-policy reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
